features: 🪅【X-Large Christmas Drawstring Gift Bags】5 pcs Classically Designed Christmas gift bags. X-Large size: 23 inch x 17 inch (58 cm x 43 cm).
🪽【Premium Material】Holiday drawstring gift bags are made of premium aluminum foil material.Durable, non-toxic, oder free and tear retardant.
❄️【Save you Time】Our drawstring bags save you the complicated process of wrapping presents and give you more time to enjoy the fun of friends' parties, which is a perfect Christmas.Merry Christmas!

💌【Wide Application】Super Value Christmas present bags for choice to Christmas Gift Wrapping.Also Perfect for birthday, shower, congrats, wedding, and holiday gifts.They are very suitable for loading books, clothes, cookies and any other items you want.

🎄【Perfect Christmas Decoration】These well-designed Christmas bags can not only be used for Christmas gift packaging, but also the perfect Christmas decoration.These uniquely designed Christmas gift bags are placed under your tree to wow everyone who meets them and compliment your taste.
